creator: gpalmer@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems the CGI script sometimes corrupts the output sent via the WWW
which renders some PR's useless for remote developers.

Fix: 

Fix the CGI script?
How-To-Repeat: 
Point your favourite WWW browser at:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi-bin/query-pr.cgi?pr=1201

Then scroll down and try and read the uuencoded file there. Note that
the lines are not all even, like they should be.
